channel.title: crypt on lim
channel.description: Recent content in crypt on lim

item.title: crypt
item.description: git-crypt 1 2 3 4 scoop install git-crypt # 导出密钥 git-crypt export-key C:/Users/xxx/Downloads/gitCryptKey git仓库 1 2 3 4 5 6 7 8 git-crypt init # 创建规则文件：.gitattributes *.md filter=git-crypt diff=git-crypt *.html filter=git-crypt diff=git-crypt # 解锁 git-crypt unlock 密钥文件路径
